title: Synchronize open question records
reason: The stronger docs-contract sync diagnostics require resolved and open question IDs to be represented consistently in docs and contract.
proposed_changes: Represent OQ-001 as resolved in both docs and contract.
Represent OQ-002 as an open non-blocking question in canonical docs section format.
risk_impact: No readiness weakening or runtime behavior is introduced; the change repairs example sync drift.
readiness_impact: The example remains READY_WITH_DEFERRALS with OQ-002 as a non-blocking deferral.
